calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 No Appearance; Order To Arrest

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Continued For Letter To Nov-30-15 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday April 2,2015 in Department 525:
Cameron Ross Boucher, Esq. (415-626-6494),counsel for Respondent/Plaintiff Maria Ezcurra-Padilla who is also present.
Marvin Chen, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties sworn.

Mr. Chen responds to why he should be granted the Motion to Vacate the Judgment.
Court will hear the matter and decide on the merit of denied Motion.

Ms. Ezcurra-Padilla testifies on her own behalf and Counsel Boucher testifies on behalf of Ms. Ezcurra-Padilla. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
GROUP EXHR (A) - POS, continuance order, notice of entry of judgment, police report, lease agreement for 488 Wilde Ave, 6/2014 - 3/2015 e-mails, Register of Actions on case 847666.

Marvin Chan testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. All the evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Continued To Apr-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Continued To Oct-24-14 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
